title_variants: Games Room Duplex – Snooker, Air Hockey, Cinema
Duplex with Private Games Room & 70” HDTV
analysis.rewritten_desc: Welcome to an exclusive duplex in the heart of Ecclesfield, designed for unforgettable entertainment and comfort. The ground floor boasts a fully‑furnished games room featuring a grand snooker table, a professional‑grade air‑hockey table, and a 70‑inch 5.1.4 JBL Atmos surround‑sound system that turns movie night into a cinema experience. Adjacent is a modern kitchen equipped for everything from quick breakfasts to gourmet meals, and a dining area that seats six. Two double pull‑out sofas in the lounge and games room provide additional sleeping space, while the private upstairs bedroom adds a third double bed, allowing the whole home to comfortably host up to six guests. Both bathrooms are sparkling clean, stocked with essentials, plush towels, and premium shower‑gel and soap. Guests enjoy a workspace, high‑speed Wi‑Fi, a 70‑inch HDTV, PS4 console, and a selection of arcade games for extra fun. The property sits near charming pubs, cafés, woodland walks, and is a short drive from Sheffield’s vibrant nightlife. With a washer in‑unit, essentials, and thoughtful touches like room‑darkening blinds and an iron, this duplex offers the perfect blend of relaxation and excitement for short or longer stays.
analysis.photo_order_rec: Use a high‑impact image of the games room showcasing the snooker table and sound system as the cover photo – it instantly communicates the property’s unique entertainment value.
key_diagnosis: Rate reduction: your nightly price of £156.48 is 49% above the local median (£104.90); lowering it toward the median can boost the current 29.3% occupancy.
Safety upgrade: the listing lacks a carbon monoxide alarm, a key safety amenity that guests expect and that can improve trust and ranking.
Title overhaul: the current title scores ~4/10 and includes cryptic code (M1J35 1.5m); replace it with a clear, benefit‑focused headline to improve SEO and click‑through.
analysis.outreach_hook: Your nightly rate is 49% above the local median (£104.90) while your 90‑day occupancy is only 29.3% (vs a 48.9% market median) – a clear opportunity to boost bookings.
